task_description: Complete UI redesign of the IND-VIAS DualSight DMS Cockpit from simple card-grid layout to professional automotive cockpit console with 6 major sections: top status bar, left driver console, center live video panel, right 3D head model, bottom timeline, and decision explanation card.

verification.summary: INTEGRATIONS_ONLY network prevents npm install/build/test. All 7 TSX files verified correct. Semantic review found 4 issues (useEffect deps, hardcoded FPS, rotation clamping, key stability) - all fixed. Value range bugs (0-100 vs 0-1) also fixed in earlier pass. Code uses only react, recharts, lucide-react + Tailwind utilities. CSS Grid layout: grid-rows-[auto_1fr_auto], grid-cols-[280px_1fr_320px], h-screen overflow-hidden for 1920x1080.
